title: report.filed
description: Published by Report Service when a user files a report against another user. Consumed by Admin Service which escalates the review queue if report_count_for_target exceeds a threshold.
_comment_threshold: report_count_for_target is denormalised into this event so Admin Service can apply threshold logic without querying Report Service's database. Each service owns its data — Admin reads a summary, not raw rows (Database per Service principle).
_comment_dlq: If the outbox relay fails to publish this event after 3 retries, it routes to report.filed.dlq for manual inspection. Safety reports must not be silently lost.

reason.description: Report category selected by the reporter.

report_count_for_target.description: Total number of reports filed against reported_id (including this one). Admin Service uses this to auto-escalate when the count crosses a configured threshold.
